name: Creepy Crawly Gelatin
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir the boiling water into the gelatin in a large bowl for at least 2 minutes until completely dissolved.
2. Stir in the cold water.
3. Pour the mixture into a sprayed 9-inch pie plate.
4. Refrigerate for about 1 1/2 hours, or until thickened (when a spoon is drawn through it leaves a definite impression).
5. Push gummy worms into the gelatin.
6. Refrigerate for an additional 2 hours, or until firm.
7. To unmold, dip the pie plate in warm water for about 15 seconds.
8. Gently pull the gelatin from around the edge with moist fingers.
9. Place a moistened serving plate on top of the pie plate.
10. Invert the pie plate and serving plate; holding the plates together, shake slightly to loosen.
11. Gently remove the pie plate and center the gelatin on the serving plate.
12. Garnish with additional gummy worms, if desired.
Makes 8 servings.
This recipe is from Crayola Kids magazine and the Jell-O brand gelatin.
